description: Product Description Value Plus-Copier Multipurpose Printing Copy Paper A4 75gsm, 5x500 Sheets, White Professional Results. Everyday Value. Get vibrant, high-resolution print results every time with Value Plus Colour Copy & Printing Paper . Designed for use with all major laser and inkjet printers, as well as copiers , this paper delivers smooth performance, sharp text, and vivid colour reproduction—ideal for both professional and personal use. Product Specifications Size: A4 (210mm x 297mm) Weight: 75gsm Finish: Extra smooth Print Compatibility: Laser, Inkjet, Copier Printing: Suitable for full-colour and monochrome printing Environmental Certification: Ecolabel Certified Key Features & Benefits Exceptional Print Quality Crisp text and vibrant colours with a surface designed for superior ink and toner adhesion. Smooth, Jam-Free Performance High-smoothness finish ensures reliable runability and reduces paper jams in all printers. Double-Sided Printing No show-through—perfect for duplex printing with clean, consistent results. Universal Printer Compatibility Works with all laser printers, inkjet printers, and standard copiers. Sustainable Choice Designed with sustainability at its core. From sourcing renewable or recycled resources to reducing energy consumption during production, every step is carefully considered to support a greener planet. As a result, it stands out as a responsible and thoughtful choice for environmentally conscious users who prioritize sustainability in their purchasing decisions. Ideal for Home or Office Whether you're working from a quiet home office or managing the demands of a high-traffic workplace, Opportunity Paper delivers reliable and efficient performance every time. Engineered for consistent quality, it ensures smooth printing with minimal jams or disruptions, making it ideal for everything from everyday documents to high-volume print jobs. Reliable Quality. Outstanding Results. Whether you're printing business documents, high-quality marketing materials, or everyday papers, Value Plus Colour Copy Paper delivers exceptional performance at an excellent value . Choose smarter printing—choose Value Plus.
